content: Commercial AIOps core feature set (BigPanda, PagerDuty AIOps, Datadog Event Management, Splunk ITSI): (1) ingestion + normalisation of heterogeneous events into a unified schema (timestamps, source, severity, message); (2) deduplication — collapse repeated identical alerts into one event with a counter, 70-85% compression rates cited; (3) correlation — group causally related alerts using timing, topology, component dependencies; (4) root cause analysis to cut MTTR; (5) noise reduction as the headline value proposition. Dedup+normalise+correlate is the universal baseline across all vendors.
